text: Improve the supervisor flow: post global instructions only once. Then situation and available actions per message

status.comment: Already implemented (status reconciliation 2026-06-15). Verified in code: the global INSTRUCT guide is posted only once per context epoch via consumeInstructLead()/instructSent in watchdog-service.ts (re-armed after /compact), and generateSupervisorPrompt() in supervisor-prompts.ts builds every per-message prompt from buildSituation() (worker session + status) plus buildActionsList(state) (the available action types) plus examples. This matches the aim exactly. Shipped in commit 5bca268; overlaps the broader supervisor-comms aim f02454a1 (also done).
